bug_report.summary: Pinned-tabs splitter/handle leaves a visible artifact after unpinning the last pinned tab
steps_to_reproduce: Open a few tabs (e.g., about:mozilla, about:robots, about:license)
Pin one tab (e.g., about:mozilla) so the pinned tabs area appears
Hover the boundary between pinned tabs and normal tab list so the splitter/handle shows
Unpin the last pinned tab (so there are no pinned tabs left)
expected_behaviors: When there are no pinned tabs, the pinned-tabs area disappears and the splitter/handle is fully hidden (no visible remnants).
actual_behaviors: A small UI remnant remains visible in the sidebar where the splitter/handle would be (seen near the left edge around the tabstrip, bbox ~[18,188,36,201]).

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — misinterpreted or imagined GUI rendering
